products.notes: Labeled "First to Market" but site states "Pre-production designs shown below. Final specifications subject to change." Vendor-level NDAA §889 claim not tied to this SKU by name.

unresolved_questions: NDAA §889 compliance is claimed at the vendor/supply-chain level for all motors but no individual SKU (DS-2814, DS-2207, DS-3508) is named in the compliance section — marked not_disclosed rather than yes.
All three motors are pre-production ('Coming Soon' / 'Pre-production designs shown below'); readiness may change once production begins.
'View Specs' links appear on the product cards but the crawler discovered no outbound links (likely JavaScript modals or in-page anchors), so no additional spec pages were available to fetch.
